extraction.one_line_summary: COLBRELLI Sonny won Paris-Roubaix 2021 in a wet October sprint, outlasting VAN DER POEL Mathieu who cracked late after massive effort.
tactical_patterns: VAN DER POEL Mathieu overspent catching back after early mechanical, passed MOSCON Gianni late but cracked in final sprint.
MOSCON Gianni fourth after nearly winning shows ineos strength but inability to convert cobbles dominance to victory.
VERMEERSCH Florian second at young age signals emergence as legitimate monument contender on wet cobbles.
LAMPAERT Yves crashed early showing DeceuninckQuickStep vulnerable when wet conditions neutralize numerical advantage.

rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: positive: First monument win at 31 after surviving brutal wet conditions, best sprint among survivors, Italian cobbles resurgence
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: negative: Early mechanical forced chase expenditure, passed rivals late but emptied for third, tactical overcommitment cost Monument win
rider_signals.VERMEERSCH Florian: positive: Second place as young rider in extreme conditions establishes him as serious cobbles contender beyond breakaway specialist
rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: neutral: Fourth after being caught late shows strong wet weather cobbles ability but lacks finishing speed against pure sprinters
rider_signals.LAMPAERT Yves: negative: Early crash in wet conditions when DeceuninckQuickStep needed him protecting ASGREEN/VAN BAARLE shows vulnerability to conditions
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: Multiple crashes including early fall and chain issue shows age/reflexes declining in technical wet cobbles racing
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: Exceptional bike handling avoided early crashes that caught SAGAN and TIM DECLERCQ on identical trajectory, cyclocross skills decisive
